title: SkRedis
description: SkRedis is a Skript addon that allows you to interact with pubsub and to store data in your Redis database.
body:
![GitHub Actions Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/byPixelTV/SkRedis/build.yml?branch=release&style=for-the-badge) ![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/byPixelTV/skRedis?style=for-the-badge) ![GitHub All Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/byPixelTV/skRedis/total?style=for-the-badge)

SkRedis 📊

The modern way to use Redis with Skript!

> > # ⛏️ Minecraft Support 🎮: > - SkRedis is only compatible with the latest Minecraft version > - I will only support the latest release of Minecraft, this mean that **1.21.8 is** supported, but **1.21.1 isn't!** If you want to get official support, you have to use the latest version of **Skript, SkRedis and Minecraft!**
> > # 💻 Development Builds 🌐: > - **Development Builds:** https://ci.bypixel.dev/job/skredis/

Uses modern technology 🚀
